name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ turn = 1

Next == 
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ state[i] := "trying"
        /\ turn := i
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
        /\ turn = i
        /\ state[i] := "critical"
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
        /\ state[i] := "idle"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an element if not full *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an element if not empty *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ Keys \in FiniteSets
          /\ Values \in FiniteSets

====
